SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS BASE RUM BACARDÍ Reserva Limitada rum COCKTAILS Limitada Neat BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada rum is the ultimate expression of luxury. Reserved for moments where only the finest will do, this is the ultimate libation for occasions that call for something dignified - and it's even better when shared. BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada is crafted by the Maestros de Ron BACARDÍ. How to make a Limitada Neat 50 ml BACARDÍ Reserva Limitada rum Servings Copy Limitada Neat ingredients Copied! Limitada Neat Recipe One step at a time 1 Get Set Use an old fashioned glass, un-chilled. 2 Pour Pour BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada rum into the glass. 3 Serve Serve, no garnish. 4 Savour Sip and savour. MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW OUR RECOMMENDED RUM COCKTAILS Like This? Try These If this is your kind of cocktail, here’s our selection of other BACARDÍ cocktails that might suit your taste View all Rum cocktails Diez Neat Ocho on the Rocks Ocho Old Fashioned Rum Negroni Hotel Nacional Drag to discover more View all Rum cocktails FAQ WANT TO KNOW MORE? How do you make rum? Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended. What is the difference between dark, gold and white rum? Rum is a wonderfully complex and diverse spirit. Color can give us clues about time spent aging or the flavours that might be found within. Dark can be bold, sweet (or dry) and even smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth, subtle and often refreshing. But color can be misleading. The best way to truly understand a rum is to taste it for yourself. SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone.
